description: Style Note This business organizer from hidekraft is a must-have accessory for the style conscious male. Carry your monetary essentials and important documents in style with this classic business organizer. Product Details Brown textured business organizer with a narrow flap and magnetic button closure Two-fold business organizer with six card slots, one id card holder, a zippered pocket and two insert pockets Branding embossed on the front Material and Care Genuine leather Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 16 cm Width: 20 cm
